title: IESO Zonal Load Forecast (Pre-Market Renewal) JSON API
description:
Hourly load forecast by zone for the Independent Electricity System Operator (IESO) in Ontario. Values are reported for *Ontario*, *East*, and *West*. 

⚠️ Following the implementation of IESO's Market Renewal Program this report is no longer updated and exists for historical data only. [See the new source here](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/ieso_zonal_load_forecast_hourly).
